mixpanel.label: Mixpanel focus
mixpanel.plan_line: Mixpanel for product analytics — funnels, retention, flows, segmentation, and JQL queries.
mixpanel.base_notes: Query events, funnels, flows, retention, segmentation/insights, boards, and run JQL-like queries via the official Mixpanel MCP server. Use only Get/List/Run-Query/Search tools. WARNING: the server also exposes destructive tools (Delete-Dashboard, Bulk-Edit-Properties, taxonomy edits) — never create, edit, or delete anything; read-only depends on a Consumer-role account (see SETUP.md). Strong for funnel and retention root-cause.
